forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: 8b5cf6
+description: 'Add a conversation log / comment thread to kanban task cards. Comments are a structured FIELD on the task (not their own entity kind) — a list of dependent members, each capturing who (actor), what (free text), and when (ISO 8601 timestamp). Surfaces "comment" as a noun in the kanban op system (add/list/edit/delete), renders in the task inspector via field metadata, and updates the implement/finish/kanban skills so the agent records progress as a conversation log while working cards. NOTE: partial scaffolding already exists — Noun::Comment/Comments in types/operation.rs and KanbanError::CommentNotFound in error.rs are present but unrouted; the comment field type does NOT yet exist in swissarmyhammer-fields.'
+name: Card Comments (Conversation Log)
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: 8b5cf6
-description: 'Add a conversation log / comment thread to kanban task cards.
